utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. In the final plan: health_coverage is present with physical and mental health insurance and costs (monthly_costs provided), so it is specified. property_coverage is an empty object, so not specified. travel_coverage is an empty object, so not specified. additional_services is present with an addon and monthly_cost, so specified. total_budget is present with monthly and annual amounts, so specified. Therefore, 3 items are fully specified out of 5.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes three identifiable items that match entries in the ground-truth ratings: (1) Primary health coverage - physical: LifeFirst Standard Plan; (2) Primary health coverage - mental: LifeFirst Standard Plan; (3) An additional services add-on labeled 'Wellness & Adventure Support Package'. The first two map directly to 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' under primary health coverage physical and mental, each with rating 9. The 'Wellness & Adventure Support Package' is not an exact name in the ground-truth list. Its description highlights emergency support, preventive services, and accident safeguards for high-adrenaline activities, which most closely aligns with 'Adventure Travel Coverage' in travel_enhancement_services (rated 10) as the essential add-on for adventure sports. Therefore, map it to that rating.
